Represents the chess board and the pieces on it.

color - Variable in class pieces.Piece
 

D

G

game - package game
 
Game - Class in game
Runs the chess game loop and handles player input.

Creates a new game.

Gets the player's remaining pieces.

Gets the column.
getColor() - Method in class pieces.Piece
 
getColor() - Method in class player.Player
Gets the player's color.

Gets the player's name.

Gets the piece at a row and column.
getPosition() - Method in class pieces.Piece
 
getPossibleMoves(Board) - Method in class pieces.Bishop
Finds all possible moves for the bishop.

Finds all possible moves for the knight.

Finds all possible moves for the pawn.

getPossibleMoves(Board) - Method in class pieces.Queen
Finds all possible moves for the queen.
getPossibleMoves(Board) - Method in class pieces.Rook
Finds all possible moves for the rook.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
Main method that runs the game.
Main - Class in Unnamed Package
Starts the chess program.
Main() - Constructor for class Main
 
makeMove() - Method in class player.Player
Placeholder method for making a move.
movePiece(Position, Position) - Method in class board.Board
Moves a piece from one position to another.

P

Pawn - Class in pieces
Represents a pawn.
Pawn(String, Position) - Constructor for class pieces.Pawn
Creates a pawn.
Piece - Class in pieces
Abstract base class for all chess pieces.
Piece(String, Position, String) - Constructor for class pieces.Piece
Creates a piece with a color, board position, and display symbol.
pieces - package pieces
 
player - package player
 
Player - Class in player
Represents one player in the game.
Player(String, String) - Constructor for class player.Player
Creates a player with a name and color.
position - Variable in class pieces.Piece
 
Position - Class in utils
Stores a spot on the chess board using row and column.
Position(int, int) - Constructor for class utils.Position
Creates a position with a row and column.

Q

Queen - Class in pieces
Represents a queen.
Queen(String, Position) - Constructor for class pieces.Queen
Creates a queen.

R

removePiece(Piece) - Method in class player.Player
Removes a piece after it is captured.

Represents a rook.

S

setCol(int) - Method in class utils.Position
Changes the column.

Places a piece at a row and column.
setPosition(Position) - Method in class pieces.Piece
 
setRow(int) - Method in class utils.Position
Changes the row.
start() - Method in class game.Game
Starts the game and keeps it running until the user quits.
symbol - Variable in class pieces.Piece
